refined_fr.refined_fr: The NGHE solution shall maintain teleoperation communication quality such that packet loss does not exceed the customer-defined limit under agreed network conditions.
refined_fr.rationale: Refining the original FR clarifies the performance metric (packet loss) and the operational context (agreed network conditions), ensuring measurable and testable requirements.
refined_fr.verification_idea: Measure packet loss percentage during teleoperation sessions under controlled network conditions and compare against customer-defined limits.
sub_frs: FR1: Monitor real-time packet loss during teleoperation.
FR2: Adapt communication parameters to maintain packet loss within limits.
FR3: Report communication quality status to relevant modules.

candidate_dps: DP1: Implement adaptive communication protocol with error correction and retransmission.
DP2: Use dedicated high-reliability network link with QoS prioritization.
DP3: Integrate real-time packet loss monitoring and dynamic adjustment algorithms.
selected_dp.selected_dp: DP1: Implement adaptive communication protocol with error correction and retransmission.

potential_sources: Interaction between communication protocol and network link quality.
coupling_check.notes: DP1 logically encapsulates communication quality control, minimizing coupling with other system functions.

assumptions_risks: Assumes network conditions are within agreed parameters.
Risk of increased latency due to retransmissions affecting teleoperation responsiveness.
selected_dp.recommended_revision: Consider integrating latency monitoring as part of the DP to balance packet loss and responsiveness.

im_boundary.name: Teleoperation
im_boundary.scope: Software and hardware components responsible for teleoperation communication and control.

external_interfaces.name: Network Link
external_interfaces.details: Interface for sending and receiving teleoperation data packets over the network.

external_interfaces.name: Telemetry
external_interfaces.details: Interface to report communication quality metrics to the NGHE Solution module.

external_interfaces.name: Tasking
external_interfaces.details: Interface to receive teleoperation commands from the NGHE Solution or Vehicle modules.

module_containment_scores.notes: Contains overall system coordination but less direct control over communication protocols.
Physical vehicle components have limited role in communication protocol implementation.
Primary module responsible for teleoperation communication, best containment for DP.
Focuses on safety alerts, minimal involvement in communication quality control.

assigned_im.containment_hypothesis: Assigning the DP to the Teleoperation module centralizes communication quality control, minimizing diffusion and improving maintainability.
containment_risks: Potential dependency on network link quality managed outside Teleoperation module.
Risk of insufficient interface definition with NGHE Solution for status reporting.
assigned_im.recommended_revision: Enhance interface definitions and monitoring integration between Teleoperation and NGHE Solution modules.

fr_dp_gate.reason: The selected DP (adaptive communication protocol) directly addresses the refined FR with clear performance targets and measurable parameters.

diffusion_risks: Possible latency impact due to retransmission logic diffusion across modules.
Dependency on network link quality outside Teleoperation module.
dp_im_gate.containment_notes: Teleoperation module shows high containment score and low diffusion, suitable for DP implementation.

fr_im_gate.verification_feasibility: Verification can be performed by monitoring packet loss and communication quality metrics via Teleoperation interfaces.
fr_im_gate.allocation_clarity: Clear allocation of responsibility to Teleoperation module with defined interfaces.

recommended_revisions: Refine latency monitoring and mitigation strategies within DP and IM.
Clarify interface contracts between Teleoperation and NGHE Solution for communication quality reporting.

decision.justification: The functional decomposition level is complete with clear FR refinement, DP selection, and IM assignment meeting containment and coupling criteria. Verification and ownership are well defined.
next_level_sub_frs: FR1: Monitor real-time packet loss during teleoperation.
FR2: Adapt communication parameters to maintain packet loss within limits.
FR3: Report communication quality status to relevant modules.

revise.why: In future levels, incorporate latency monitoring and balancing mechanisms to optimize teleoperation responsiveness alongside packet loss.

assumptions: Network conditions remain within agreed parameters.
Customer-defined packet loss limits are achievable with adaptive protocols.
open_risks: Latency impact due to retransmission may affect teleoperation control quality.
Interface definitions between Teleoperation and NGHE Solution may require refinement.
evidence_needed: Performance data from adaptive communication protocol under representative network conditions.
Verification test results for packet loss and latency metrics.
